entry.title: New: CR 25-80 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 152 (2025), to amend the Fiscal Year 2026 Budget, Appendix A, Part I, to: 1) delete the appropriation for Community Development Block Grant Program; and 2) increase the appropriation for County-owned Senior Affordable Rental Housing, Project: Nā Hale Kupuna Operations, by $51,151.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
